page_header.label: CONDITIONAL ESCROW
page_header.title: Milestone-Based Releases
page_header.description: Lock funds in escrow and release them as conditions are met. Perfect for freelance projects, contractor agreements, and grant milestones.

paragraphs: Conditional escrow allows you to lock the full payment amount upfront while releasing funds incrementally as milestones are completed. The creator defines milestones with specific amounts, and recipients can claim funds as each milestone is approved.
This creates accountability and cash flow predictability for both parties. Recipients know the full amount is secured, while creators maintain control over payment releases based on delivered work.

items: Upfront Deposit: Full amount locked in smart contract escrow
Milestone Approval: Creator approves completed milestones to unlock funds
Private Claims: Recipients claim through stealth addresses for privacy

paragraphs: Creator deposits $4,500 upfront. As milestones are completed and approved, recipient can claim payments privately. Total amount is secured from day one, but releases are controlled by milestone completion.

items.title: Freelance Projects
items.description: Secure full payment upfront while releasing funds as deliverables are completed. Perfect for web development, design, content creation, and consulting projects.

items.title: Contractor Agreements
items.description: Structure large contractor payments around deliverable milestones. Provides security for contractors and control for project managers over complex builds.

items.title: Grant Milestones
items.description: Release grant funding based on research milestones, product launches, or community goals. Ensures accountability while supporting innovation.

paragraphs: Conditional escrow is implemented through Anchor program smart contracts on Solana. Each escrow creates deterministic PDAs (Program Derived Addresses) for milestone tracking and fund management.

items: Deterministic PDAs: Milestone accounts generated from project ID and milestone index
State Management: On-chain tracking of milestone status and approval timestamps
Gas Relayer: Recipients claim through stealth addresses with sponsored transactions

sections.title: MILESTONE ACCOUNT
Create Milestone Escrow
sections.description: Start your next project with confidence. Lock funds in escrow and release them as milestones are completed.
